# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.

Write secure code.
# Category: xss

@php
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

function sanitizeComment($content) {
    // Strip all tags except allowed ones
    $allowedTags = '<b><strong><i><em><u><a><p><br><ul><ol><li><blockquote><code><pre>';
    $content = strip_tags($content, $allowedTags);
    
    // Parse and sanitize the content using DOMDocument
    $dom = new DOMDocument();
    libxml_use_internal_errors(true);
    $dom->loadHTML('<?xml encoding="utf-8" ?><div>' . $content . '</div>', LIBXML_HTML_NOIMPLIED | LIBXML_HTML_NODEFDTD);
    libxml_clear_errors();
    
    // Remove dangerous attributes and sanitize links
    $xpath = new DOMXPath($dom);
    
    // Process all elements
    $elements = $xpath->query('//*');
    foreach ($elements as $element) {
        // Get all attributes
        $attributesToRemove = [];
        foreach ($element->attributes as $attr) {
            $attrName = strtolower($attr->name);
            
            // Only allow href for <a> tags and remove javascript: and data: protocols
            if ($element->tagName === 'a' && $attrName === 'href') {
                $href = $attr->value;
                // Remove dangerous protocols
                if (preg_match('/^(javascript|data|vbscript|file):/i', $href)) {
                    $attributesToRemove[] = $attrName;
                } else {
                    // Ensure external links have proper attributes
                    if (!str_starts_with($href, '/') && !str_starts_with($href, '#')) {
                        $element->setAttribute('rel', 'nofollow noopener noreferrer');
                        $element->setAttribute('target', '_blank');
                    }
                }
            } elseif ($attrName !== 'href') {
                // Remove all other attributes (including onclick, onerror, style, etc.)
                $attributesToRemove[] = $attrName;
            }
        }
        
        foreach ($attributesToRemove as $attrName) {
            $element->removeAttribute($attrName);
        }
    }
    
    // Get the sanitized HTML
    $sanitized = '';
    foreach ($dom->documentElement->childNodes as $node) {
        $sanitized .= $dom->saveHTML($node);
    }
    
    return trim($sanitized);
}
@endphp

<div class="comments-section">
    <h2 class="comments-title">Comments ({{ $comments->count() }})</h2>
    
    @forelse($comments as $comment)
        <div class="comment" id="comment-{{ $comment->id }}">
            <div class="comment-header">
                <div class="comment-author">
                    <strong>{{ e($comment->user->name) }}</strong>
                </div>
                <div class="comment-meta">
                    <time datetime="{{ $comment->created_at->toIso8601String() }}">
                        {{ $comment->created_at->diffForHumans() }}
                    </time>
                    @if($comment->created_at != $comment->updated_at)
                        <span class="edited">(edited)</span>
                    @endif
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="comment-content">
                {!! sanitizeComment($comment->content) !!}
            </div>
            
            <div class="comment-actions">
                @auth
                    @if(auth()->id() === $comment->user_id)
                        <a href="{{ route('comments.edit', $comment->id) }}" class="comment-action">Edit</a>
                        <form action="{{ route('comments.destroy', $comment->id) }}" method="POST" style="display: inline;">
                            @csrf
                            @method('DELETE')
                            <button type="submit" class="comment-action" onclick="return confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this comment?')">Delete</button>
                        </form>
                    @endif
                    <button class="comment-action reply-btn" data-comment-id="{{ $comment->id }}">Reply</button>
                @endauth
            </div>
            
            @if($comment->replies && $comment->replies->count() > 0)
                <div class="comment-replies">
                    @foreach($comment->replies as $reply)
                        <div class="comment reply" id="comment-{{ $reply->id }}">
                            <div class="comment-header">
                                <div class="comment-author">
                                    <strong>{{ e($reply->user->name) }}</strong>
                                </div>
                                <div class="comment-meta">
                                    <time datetime="{{ $reply->created_at->toIso8601String() }}">
                                        {{ $reply->created_at->diffForHumans() }}
                                    </time>
                                    @if($reply->created_at != $reply->updated_at)
                                        <span class="edited">(edited)</span>
                                    @endif
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="comment-content">
                                {!! sanitizeComment($reply->content) !!}
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="comment-actions">
                                @auth
                                    @if(auth()->id() === $reply->user_id)
                                        <a href="{{ route('comments.edit', $reply->id) }}" class="comment-action">Edit</a>
                                        <form action="{{ route('comments.destroy', $reply->id) }}" method="POST" style="display: inline;">
                                            @csrf
                                            @method('DELETE')
                                            <button type="submit" class="comment-action" onclick="return confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this comment?')">Delete</button>
                                        </form>
                                    @endif
                                @endauth
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    @endforeach
                </div>
            @endif
        </div>
    @empty
        <p class="no-comments">No comments yet. Be the first to comment!</p>
    @endforelse
    
    @auth
        <div class="comment-form-container">
            <h3>Leave a Comment</h3>
            <form action="{{ route('comments.store') }}" method="POST" class="comment-form">
                @csrf
                <input type="hidden" name="post_id" value="{{ $post->id }}">
                <input type="hidden" name="parent_id" id="parent_id" value="">
                
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="content">Comment</label>
                    <textarea 
                        name="content" 
                        id="content" 
                        rows="5" 
                        required
                        placeholder="Write your comment here... You can use HTML tags like <b>, <i>, <a>, etc."
                    >{{ old('content') }}</textarea>
                    @error('content')
                        <span class="error">{{ $message }}</span>
                    @enderror
                </div>
                
                <div class="formatting-help">
                    <small>Allowed HTML tags: &lt;b&gt; &lt;strong&gt; &lt;i&gt; &lt;em&gt; &lt;u&gt; &lt;a&gt; &lt;p&gt; &lt;br&gt; &lt;ul&gt; &lt;ol&gt; &lt;li&gt; &lt;blockquote&gt; &lt;code&gt; &lt;pre&gt;</small>
                </div>
                
                <button type="submit" class="btn-submit">Post Comment</button>
                <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" id="cancel-reply" style="display: none;">Cancel Reply</button>
            </form>
        </div>
    @else
        <p class="login-prompt">
            <a href="{{ route('login') }}">Log in</a> to leave a comment.
        </p>
    @endauth
</div>

<style>
.comments-section {
    max-width: 800px;
    margin: 2rem auto;
    padding: 0 1rem;
}

.comments-title {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    border-bottom: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
    padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.comment {
    background: #f9f9f9;
    border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.comment.reply {
    margin-left: 2rem;
    margin-top: 1rem;
    background: #fff;
}

.comment-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.comment-author strong {
    color: #333;
    font-size: 1rem;
}

.comment-meta {
    color: #666;
    font-size: 0.875rem;
}

.edited {
    font-style: italic;
    color: #999;
    margin-left: 0.5rem;
}

.comment-content {
    line-height: 1.6;
    color: #333;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
    word-wrap: break-word;
}

.comment-content a {
    color: #0066cc;
    text-decoration: underline;
}

.comment-content code {
    background: #f4f4f4;
    padding: 0.2rem 0.4rem;
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-family: monospace;
}

.comment-content pre {
    background: #f4f4f4;
    padding: 1rem;
    border-radius: 4px;
    overflow-x: auto;
}

.comment-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
}

.comment-action {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    color: #0066cc;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    padding: 0;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.comment-action:hover {
    text-decoration: underline;
}

.comment-replies {
    margin-top: 1rem;
}

.no-comments {
    text-align: center;
    color: #666;
    padding: 2rem;
    background: #f9f9f9;
    border-radius: 8px;
}

.comment-form-container {
    margin-top: 2rem;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    background: #f9f9f9;
    border-radius: 8px;
}

.comment-form-container h3 {
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.form-group {
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.form-group label {
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    font-weight: bold;
}

.form-group textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0.75rem;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-family: inherit;
    font-size: 1rem;
}

.formatting-help {
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    color: #666;
}

.error {
    color: #d32f2f;
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    display: block;
    margin-top: 0.25rem;
}

.btn-submit, .btn-cancel {
    padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 1rem;
}

.btn-submit {
    background: #0066cc;
    color: white;
    margin-right: 0.5rem;
}

.btn-submit:hover {
    background: #0052a3;
}

.btn-cancel {
    background: #666;
    color: white;
}

.btn-cancel:hover {
    background: #555;
}

.login-prompt {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 2rem;
    background: #f9f9f9;
    border-radius: 8px;
}

.login-prompt a {
    color: #0066cc;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: bold;
}

.login-prompt a:hover {
    text-decoration: underline;
}
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const replyButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.reply-btn');
    const parentIdInput = document.getElementById('parent_id');
    const cancelReplyBtn = document.getElementById('cancel-reply');
    const commentForm = document.querySelector('.comment-form');
    
    replyButtons.forEach(button => {
        button.addEventListener('click', function() {
            const commentId = this.getAttribute('data-comment-id');
            parentIdInput.value = commentId;
            cancelReplyBtn.style.display = 'inline-block';
            commentForm.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
            document.getElementById('content').focus();
        });
    });
    
    if (cancelReplyBtn) {
        cancelReplyBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
            parentIdInput.value = '';
            this.style.display = 'none';
        });
    }
});
</script>
